description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to main and master branches, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. Use a matrix job to build on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9 and Release configuration. The job should check out the repository, set up Miniconda with Mambaforge, clean and configure Conda, install dependencies, create a Conda environment, and build, test, and install Reaktoro using CMake and Ninja.
